surface_verification.justification: Data-only traceability backfill: the diff touches only .shipwright governance artifacts (event-log amendments + regenerated RTM/dashboard) and zero client/server/API/store/WS code, so there is no user-erlebbare surface to drive. Executable verification (re-running the existing server+client suites, 3464/3464 green, to verify the 9 Group-B endpoints) is recorded under iterate_latest.unit.

behaviors.behavior: After the backfill, all 245 pre-existing work_completed events are classified (FR-tagged or explicit none_reason) with zero untagged
behaviors.evidence: apply_amendments fold over the backfilled shipwright_events.jsonl -> work_completed untagged=0 (tagged=156, none_reason=89)

behaviors.behavior: events.jsonl round-trips: appended event_amended overlays fold via apply_amendments so compliance reads the corrected affected_frs (touches_io_boundary boundary probe)
behaviors.evidence: fold-verification script: Group-A FRs FR-01.05/.06/.23/.25/.27 present on their target events; iterate event carries the 9 Group-B FRs; distinct spec FRs covered = 41/41

behaviors.behavior: RTM regenerates with zero NOT-VERIFIED requirements and 41/41 FRs covered
behaviors.evidence: update_compliance --phase iterate -> grep -c 'NOT VERIFIED' traceability-matrix.md = 0; 32 COVERED + 9 NO-TESTS = 41/41

behaviors.behavior: Control Grade recomputes A (95/100) from the backfilled inputs (B 85 -> A 95)
behaviors.evidence: regenerated dashboard.md Control Verdict -> 'Control Grade: A (95/100)'; requirement-traceability dimension 41/41 covered, 157/246 FR-tagged

behaviors.behavior: The 9 Group-B foundational endpoints (health/dismiss/preview/run-config/tree/file/actions-stub/diagnostics/settings) pass their existing route tests
behaviors.evidence: vitest run: server 1671/1671 + client 1793/1793 = 3464/3464 green, incl. index.test.ts, inbox/preview/run-config/tree/file/actions __tests__ routes, diagnostics.cli-context.test.ts, settings.test.ts
